articles.title: Portugal, Leao will not respond to the call for Mexico and USA. In his place Paulinho
articles.summary: Rafael Leao missed Milan's match against Torino on Saturday due to an adductor problem. Tests have fortunately ruled out injuries, but the player will not be able to respond to Portugal's call-up.

articles.title: CorSera: "Milan believes in it again. With Rabiot I can win the championship"
articles.summary: "Milan believe in it again. With Rabiot they pass the Scudetto": this is the headline in this morning's Corriere della Sera which explains that at Milanello they have once again believed in the sensational comeback of the Scudetto.

articles.title: CorSera: "Inter, only a draw. Milan is now -6"

articles.summary: Inter drew against Fiorentina and reopened a scenario that was well addressed until a few weeks ago. Now Milan is still lurking and can hope to reopen a fight that now seemed closed.
